title: subworkflow - aws create cloudformation stack
description:
Subworkflow to create a CloudFormation stack using AWS Systems Manager

Parameters:

stackName: (Required) Name for the new stack
templateUrl: (Required) S3 URL or template body
parameters: (Optional) JSON parameters for the template
timeoutInMinutes: (Optional) Stack creation timeout
capabilities: (Optional) CAPABILITY_IAM or CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) AWS OIDC connection

Waits for stack creation to complete
guide:
## 📦 **Create CloudFormation Stack**

Creates CloudFormation stack via SSM.
